findings.title: Production_ready promotion steps still pending (expected for a read-only C00 stage, not a defect)
findings.rationale: Current-subphase status fields were still implemented and the evidence root held packet.json plus command-evidence.json at C00 review time. This was expected before adding this review result, adjudication, construction inspection, and production_ready promotion.
findings.recommendation: Add claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json; promote S01 status fields to production_ready; set final_validation_rerun_at; rerun validators.

findings.title: By-design observations: title reuses existing dirs; phase-aggregate registry status stays implemented
findings.rationale: The slice title is inherited from the weighted ledger generator while the implementation opens HermesGate model surfaces in existing package directories. CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY.status remains implemented because it is a phase aggregate and RP00.P01 is not closed.
findings.recommendation: No action; record as non-blocking design context.

parsed_review.summary: PASS read-only C00 cross-validation. RP00.P01.M03.S01 implements only the HermesGate package directory-layout surface: HERMES_GATE_PACKAGE_LAYOUT with entity=HermesGate, implementedModel=false, target files/tests/fixtures, futureModelSubphases S02-S11, no-real-data/no-write flags, and nextSubphase RP00.P01.M03.S02, plus assertHermesGatePackageLayout. No HermesGate model, identifier, tenant scope, matter trace reference, lifecycle status enum, ownership metadata, relationship map, required/optional field registry, transition map, or validation helper is present. The registry exposes hermesGatePackageLayout while keeping HermesGate future-only with implementedInFutureSubphase=true and implementedSubphase=null. The synthetic fixture records expected_entity=HermesGate, implemented_model=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, and next_subphase=RP00.P01.M03.S02. The validator enforces exports, file existence, fixture evidence, future subphases, registry future-only policy, no-write boundaries, weighted-generator P2 defer, actual Claude and construction inspection requirements, and next boundary. Prior production_ready slices remain intact. No real data or product-state writes were introduced. No P0/P1/P2 findings.

raw_review_excerpt: overall_verdict=PASS; blocks_subphase_closeout=false; blocks_goal_closeout=false; findings=P3_NOTE only; no P0/P1/P2 findings.
